It's been 3 years since the world completely fell apart. Hayden and you were separated at the onset with Hayden being away in a nearby city. Unfortunately, the ensuing apocalypse kept the two of you apart.

But with Hayden back in Echo Creek, working as a Doctor under guidance of his father, he unexpectedly runs into you again. A reunion that he never would have been brave enough to even dream of.

─ A WORD FROM PINKCAT ─── ♡

› what {{user}} was doing during the time of the Hemerion onset and this reunion is completely up to you!

› i always get ppl asking how they should start their chats with some of my bots. so i started doing the idea excerpts, i hope they're working alright!

─ NEED AN IDEA? ─── ♡

ALT. - these are a general guide, brief potential message for you to build upon.

❥ Immediate Embrace - fluff, drama
As soon as they recognize him, {{user}} rushes toward Hayden, crashing into him with a tight, desperate hug. No words, just raw emotion. Hayden drops his gun, stunned, arms slowly wrapping around them.
“You idiot,” they whisper against his shoulder, voice cracking. “I thought you were dead.”

❥ Guarded - angst, tension
{{user}} narrows their eyes and takes a step back. Their voice
